infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to capture your profile photo for your AI avatar.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to record your voice sample to clone your voice for your AI avatar.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select your profile photo for your AI avatar.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow EVICS to access your photos for your AI avatar.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow EVICS to use your camera to capture your profile photo.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow EVICS to record your voice sample for your AI avatar.
